lede: A look at October 16 through the almanac — historic events, famous birthdays including Scott Ogden and Loreen, and the day's notable deaths and observances.

events.title: Hurricane Ophelia (2017)
events.desc: Storm Ophelia strikes the U.K. and Ireland causing major damage and power loss.

events.title: Lao Airlines Flight 301
events.desc: Lao Airlines Flight 301 crashes on approach to Pakse International Airport in Laos, killing 49 people.

events.title: Rahima Banu
events.desc: Three-year-old Rahima Banu, from Bangladesh, is the last known case of naturally occurring smallpox.

events.title: Project 596
events.desc: China detonates its first nuclear weapon.

events.title: Turtle Islands, Tawi-Tawi
events.desc: The Philippines takes over the administration of the Turtle Islands and the Mangsee Islands from the United Kingdom.

events.title: Margaret Sanger
events.desc: Margaret Sanger opens the first family planning clinic in the United States.

events.title: Nickel Plate Road
events.desc: The Nickel Plate Railroad opens for business.

events.title: Brigham Young University
events.desc: Brigham Young University is founded in Provo, Utah.

events.title: Battle of Ulm
events.desc: War of the Third Coalition: Napoleon surrounds the Austrian army at Ulm.

events.title: Jadwiga of Poland
events.desc: Jadwiga is crowned King of Poland, although she is a woman.

births.name: Hema Malini
births.line: Indian actress, director, producer, and politician

births.name: Itō Hirobumi
births.line: Japanese lawyer and politician, 1st Prime Minister of Japan (died 1909)

deaths.text: Ollie Olsen, Australian musician, composer and sound designer
Daphne Caruana Galizia, Maltese journalist and blogger
Bódog Török, Hungarian handball player and coach
Hans Frank, German politician and war criminal
Silvius Leopold Weiss, German lute player and composer

observances.text: Christian feast day: Colmán of Kilroot (Colman mac Cathbaid)
